summary: Completed testing of Command Center Unified features. Backend: 33/33 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working. Fixed bug where agents endpoint was querying wrong collection (admin_credentials instead of agents).

issues: React console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' - duplicate keys for DIN-20260122-0001 and DIN-20260122-0002

action_items: Fix duplicate key warning in ConciergeCommandCenter.jsx - ensure unique keys for queue items
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Backend was querying admin_credentials collection for agents, but agents are stored in 'agents' collection. Updated /api/concierge/agents and manual-assign endpoints to use correct collection.
seed_data_creation: Test tickets created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Command Center Unified fully functional. All 12 pillars working (celebrate, dine, stay, travel, care, shop, club, enjoy, fit, advisory, paperwork, emergency). New source types (membership, voice_order, autoship, stay, dine, travel, care) all queryable. CRUD operations (create, update, delete/archive) working. Manual assignment working with agents from 'agents' collection. Quick actions (claim, unclaim, change_status, change_priority, escalate) all working. Bulk actions working. CSV export working with filters.

pillar_stats_endpoint.evidence: Returns pillars object with celebrate, dine, stay, travel, care, shop, club, enjoy, fit, advisory, paperwork, emergency

queue_source_filters.description: Queue supports all new source types
queue_source_filters.evidence: Tested membership, voice_order, autoship, stay, dine, travel, care - all return 200

ticket_create.evidence: Returns success=true with ticket_id starting with TKT-

quick_actions.evidence: Tested claim, unclaim, change_status, change_priority, escalate - all return success=true

bulk_actions.evidence: Returns total, successful, failed counts with results array

csv_export.evidence: Returns text/csv with proper headers and Content-Disposition

agents_list.evidence: Returns agents array with username, name, email, active_tickets

frontend_pillar_tabs.description: Command Center shows pillar filter tabs with counts
frontend_pillar_tabs.evidence: Found tabs: Celebrate 19, Dine 22, Stay 11, Travel 25, Care 7, Shop 2, Enjoy 2, Fit 2, Advisory 13

frontend_source_filter.description: Source filter dropdown has all new options
frontend_source_filter.evidence: Found 14 options including Memberships, Voice Orders, Autoship, Stay, Dine, Travel, Care

frontend_quick_actions.description: Quick claim buttons and assign dropdowns present
frontend_quick_actions.evidence: Found 96 quick claim buttons and 100 assign dropdowns

frontend_new_ticket_export.description: New Ticket and Export CSV buttons present

mocked_apis.whatsapp: Uses click-to-chat links (wa.me) - no Business API integration

bug_fix_applied.issue: Agents endpoint returning empty list, manual assign failing with 'Agent not found'
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Backend was querying 'admin_credentials' collection which was empty. Agents are stored in 'agents' collection.
bug_fix_applied.fix: Updated /api/concierge/agents and /api/concierge/item/{id}/manual-assign to query 'agents' collection instead of 'admin_credentials'
